home.tagline: Compete with friends on Strava segments. Find rated segments, earn points, be first.
home.step1Desc: Selects 20 segments, 10 of which are rated — but you don't know which ones.
home.step2Desc: Record your workouts in Strava. We automatically check segment coverage.
home.step3Desc: Points = leader's time / your time × 100. The first to complete all rated segments gets a bonus.
home.first10: For the first 10 who complete all rated segments
home.loginCta: Sign in with Strava and join tournaments

tournaments.title: Tournaments
tournaments.emptyHint: Check back later or change the filter

detail.loginToJoin: Sign in with Strava to join
detail.participantBanner: You are participating in this tournament. Run the segments and sync your activities with Strava.
detail.segmentsHidden: Rated segments and their order are hidden until the leaderboard

leaderboard.title: 🏆 Leaderboard
leaderboard.noPassed: No one has completed this yet

profile.notParticipating: You are not participating in any tournaments yet
profile.syncDesc: Loads activities from Strava and checks segment coverage
profile.noActivities: No runs yet — sync Strava first
